# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket to store application assets. Configure the bucket for public read access so our website can serve static files (images, CSS, JavaScript). Keep the template simple for quick deployment.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  AppBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-assets"
      PublicReadAccess: true
      WebsiteConfiguration:
        IndexDocument: index.html
      CorsConfiguration:
        CorsRules:
          - AllowedOrigins:
              - "*"
            AllowedMethods:
              - GET
            MaxAge: 3000
            AllowedHeaders:
              - "*"
Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Value: !Ref AppBucket
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
  BucketUrl:
    Value: !Sub "http://${AppBucket}.s3-website-${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
    Description: URL of the S3 website bucket
